creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bradley T. Hughes from comment #6)

> Upstream has released 0.1.9, updated patch accordingly.

Thank you for your fast and good work! I'm sorry it took so long - i have 3 mentors but all of them were busy until today. 

Since they reviewed the patch for 0.1.8 and the new patch would need a new review by them, i just committed the version 0.1.8. Hopefully this will help.

I would suggest to create a new PR for the new update. But if you want i can have a look at the new patch too ;)

Greetings,
Torsten
